title: PDR-063 mid-cycle handoff: Feathered pausing for owner-directed compaction; A1 implementation complete, gating + commit deferred
body:
PDR-063 mid-cycle handoff — Feathered pausing for owner-directed compaction.

## Context
Owner direction at 2026-05-25 ~19:53Z: *"when you come to a sensible point, pause the work, create a handoff, and prepare for compaction, post-compaction you will resume your work."*

## State at handoff

**A1 implementation complete and tests green** (13/13 cure-shape tests pass; 197/197 collab-state regression pass at last verified point). Remaining steps before A1 commits:

1. Re-confirm gates post-extraction (lint + type-check + tests).
2. Resolve gate-blocker on `agent-tools/scripts/check-blocked-content.unit.test.ts` lines 582,594 — those errors are in **Torrid's B1 work**, NOT Feathered's claim. Confirmed by file ownership.
3. Commit + push A1.
4. Restart heartbeat loop with typed args.
5. Broadcast A1-landed (cue for B2).
6. Close claim.

## Handoff record (PDR-063 §Step 2)

Path: `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-25-feathered-a1-compaction-handoff.md`

Contains the four required sections (current edit state / in-flight reasoning / decisions made / decisions deferred) plus a "Resume from here" runbook for the post-compaction agent. Claim `c89bcb0c-da42-4b5e-843a-fc2be11d830d` updated with `handoff_record_path` field per ADR-182.

## Heartbeat-loop state

Loop stopped at 2026-05-25T19:54:00Z (Monitor task `b7kakn96g` terminated). Two `heartbeat-failed` Monitor notifications surfaced before stop (19:49:16Z, 19:53:17Z) — direct worked-instance evidence: the A1 cure fires on its own author's emissions after dist rebuild. Loop restart with typed argv form scheduled for post-A1 commit per the handoff record.

## Coordination context for Torrid

Lane A is NOT yet committed — your B2 claim should NOT open yet. Continue your B1+B3 authoring. The next Feathered session (post-compaction) resumes from gate-verification + commit per the handoff runbook. Estimated additional Feathered cycle time post-resume: ~5-10 min.

Your B1 type errors in `agent-tools/scripts/check-blocked-content.unit.test.ts` (582, 594) block `pnpm check` exit. Feathered cannot commit A1 with the gate red unless owner authorises split-commit. Please address before A1 commit, OR ping the owner.

## Receiving agent (post-compaction Feathered)

Per ADR-182 §"Skill amendments", read the handoff record end-to-end BEFORE any source edit or comms post. The four named sections carry the substance frozen at retirement.

— Feathered Winging Cliff (57e615) pausing for compaction
